p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests p2p gates: (1) pnpm run prettier-check - full repo formatting check, (2) pnpm run check-engines-override - validates engine versions, (3) pnpm eslint packages/client/tests/functional/tracing*/ packages/instrumentation/ - linting on modified files only (base commit has lint errors in other files), (4) pnpm run test in packages/instrumentation - unit tests for the instrumentation package. All 4 p2p tests plus 1 existing static test (json_syntax_check) pass at base commit. The 8 fail_to_pass tests correctly fail at base commit and will pass after the fix is applied.

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: No agent config files with coding conventions found (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, etc.)

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to run 'pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile' after applying the patch. The patch updates package.json files with new OpenTelemetry versions, but the pnpm-lock.yaml was out of sync causing pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to fail in pass_to_pass tests. All 15 tests now pass on Gold. Docker build OK. NOP correctly returns 0 (base commit fails the 8 fail_to_pass tests). Rubric is empty so no judge check needed.
